гҖҖгҖҖA witch is put to death in Colonial America, leaving her husband and infant daughter behind. Seventeen years later, the daughter has grown up and stands to inherit money set up by her motherвҖҷs family. Now that the stage is set, the mother wants to return to life by taking over her daughterвҖҷs body.
introduction: A witch is put to death in Colonial America, leaving her husband and infant daughter behind. Seventeen years later, the daughter has grown up and stands to inherit money set up by her motherвҖҷs family. Now that the stage is set, the mother wants to return to life by taking over her daughterвҖҷs body.
